exclude.@cucumber/cucumber: On v9 - max version supporting Node 16 (CI tests on 16/18/20); v10+ requires Node 18+
exclude.@types/chai: Existing outdated dependency - v5 requires chai v5+
exclude.@types/express: Existing outdated dependency - v5 requires express v5
exclude.chai: Existing outdated dependency - v6 is ESM-only breaking change
exclude.chai-as-promised: Existing outdated dependency - v8 requires chai v5+
exclude.dirty-chai: Existing outdated dependency - major version bump
exclude.lint-staged: On v16.x which is newer than npm latest tag (15.x) - intentional upgrade from PR #460
exclude.nyc: On v18.x which is newer than npm latest tag (17.x) - intentional upgrade from PR #456
exclude.eslint: Existing outdated dependency - v9+ requires flat config migration
exclude.eslint-config-prettier: Existing outdated dependency - tied to eslint 9+ migration
exclude.eslint-plugin-jsdoc: Existing outdated dependency - tied to eslint 9+ migration
exclude.eslint-plugin-json: Existing outdated dependency - tied to eslint 9+ migration
exclude.eslint-plugin-markdown: Existing outdated dependency - tied to eslint 9+ migration
exclude.eslint-plugin-security: Existing outdated dependency - tied to eslint 9+ migration
exclude.eslint-plugin-unicorn: Existing outdated dependency - tied to eslint 9+ migration
exclude.@typescript-eslint/parser: Existing outdated dependency - tied to eslint 9+ migration
exclude.express: Existing outdated dependency - v5 is a major breaking change
